name: BasepointZero
summary: Specifies enumerated constants used to indicate the zero level convention relating to a location on Earth. This is used in conjunction with the EarthAnchorPoint class.

enum_values.name: GroundLevel
enum_values.summary: The ground level is the convention for 0.

enum_values.name: MeanSeaLevel
enum_values.summary: The mean sea level is the convention for 0.

enum_values.name: CenterOfEarth
enum_values.summary: The center of the planet is the convention for 0.
